tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema + queries (movies, picks.movie_id, sqlc)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** movies cache table + nullable picks.movie_id + UpsertMovie/GetMovie/SetNightMovie queries; thread movie_id through the 5 night queries; regen sqlc.

**Files:** Create backend/migrations/0005_movies.sql, backend/internal/db/query/movies.sql; Modify backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql; Regenerate backend/internal/db/.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/migrations/0005_movies.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/movies.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql", "backend/internal/db/"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && just build && just test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["movies table with unique tmdb_id; nullable picks.movie_id FK ON DELETE RESTRICT", "sqlc generates db.Movie, Pick.MovieID, UpsertMovie/GetMovie/SetNightMovie", "five night queries return movie_id so they keep mapping to db.Pick"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TMDB client + pure parse helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tmdbClient (injectable baseURL, Bearer auth, timeout) with SearchMovies/FetchMovie over pure helpers (parseTMDBSearch, parseTMDBMovie, releaseYear); FetchMovie maps upstream 404 to errMovieNotFound; newTMDBClient("") returns nil.

**Files:** Create backend/tmdb.go, backend/tmdb_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/tmdb.go", "backend/tmdb_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run 'TestReleaseYear|TestParseTMDB' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseTMDBSearch/parseTMDBMovie/releaseYear pure + unit-tested incl blank/malformed dates", "FetchMovie maps upstream 404 to errMovieNotFound", "newTMDBClient(empty) returns nil"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Night DTO carries the attached movie
tasks.description:
**Goal:** nightResponse gains Movie *movieDTO (null when unset); writeNightDTO loads it via one GetMovie when Pick.MovieID valid; toNightResponse gains a *db.Movie param; nightStore gains GetMovie.

**Files:** Modify backend/nights.go, backend/nights_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/nights_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run 'TestToNightResponse' ./... && just build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nightResponse.Movie renders null when unset", "writeNightDTO GetMovie lookup only when Pick.MovieID valid", "toNightResponse maps *db.Movie incl null release_year; existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Search + attach handlers and wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /movies/search (proxy) + POST /groups/{gid}/nights/{nightId}/movie (FetchMovie->UpsertMovie->SetNightMovie); validateMovieRequest; main.go reads TMDB_READ_TOKEN + registers routes; .env.example; nightStore gains UpsertMovie+SetNightMovie.

**Files:** Modify backend/nights.go, backend/main.go, backend/.env.example, backend/nights_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/main.go", "backend/.env.example", "backend/nights_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run 'TestValidateMovieRequest' ./... && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search: 400 empty q, 503 unconfigured, 502 upstream, else mapped array", "attach: 400 bad tmdbId, 404 unknown night, 503 unconfigured, 404 unknown movie, 502 upstream, else 200 night DTO", "validateMovieRequest unit-tested"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Backend integration tests (fake TMDB)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** testcontainers + local httptest fake TMDB upstream; cover search, attach, re-attach, upsert idempotency, unknown tmdbId 404, unconfigured 503, malformed 400, unknown night 404.

**Files:** Create backend/movies_integration_test.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/movies_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run 'TestMovieAttachIntegration' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["search returns mapped results; attach populates DTO movie + creates movies row", "re-attach updates DTO; same tmdbId across two nights = one movies row", "unknown tmdbId 404; unconfigured 503; malformed 400; unknown night 404"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mobile movie client + night.movie field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lib/movies.ts (Movie, parseMovie, searchMovies); lib/nights.ts Night.movie + parseNight validation + attachMovie (kept in nights.ts to avoid import cycle); unit + integration tests; update existing night fixtures with movie:null.

**Files:** Create mobile/lib/movies.ts, movies.test.ts, movies.integration.test.ts; Modify mobile/lib/nights.ts, nights.test.ts, nights.integration.test.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/movies.ts", "mobile/lib/movies.test.ts", "mobile/lib/movies.integration.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseMovie accepts valid (incl null/missing releaseYear), rejects bad shapes", "searchMovies hits /movies/search?q=, parses array, throws non-2xx", "attachMovie POSTs {tmdbId} to .../movie, parses Night", "parseNight reads movie object/null/absent, rejects bad shape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Mobile night screen — Tonight's movie section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Search-and-attach UI block on night screen: search by title, tap result to attach, show Title (Year) with Change movie affordance; attaching takes the busy lock, searching runs while idle.

**Files:** Modify mobile/app/night.tsx.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no-movie night shows search box + results to attach", "attached movie shows Title (Year) (or title when year null) + Change movie reopening search", "attach takes busy lock + errors to banner; search runs while idle without the lock"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Docs — ADR-0007, schema.dbml, ADR index
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ADR-0007 (proxy + server source-of-truth); schema.dbml picks.movie_id nullable; ADR index entry + Last updated.

**Files:** Create docs/adr/0007-tmdb-proxy-source-of-truth.md; Modify docs/adr/README.md, docs/schema.dbml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/adr/0007-tmdb-proxy-source-of-truth.md", "docs/adr/README.md", "docs/schema.dbml"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ADR-0007 captures backend-proxy + attach re-fetch + movies cache keyed by tmdb_id", "schema.dbml picks.movie_id nullable with plan-first note", "ADR index lists ADR-0007 Accepted"]}
```
